title.en: Risk of thunderstorms before England face Norway in Miami heat
title.zh-CN: 在迈阿密炎热的英格兰面对挪威之前，雷暴的风险

summary.en: Alongside high temperatures as England face Norway in Miami, there is a risk of thunderstorms, especially near the start of their World Cup quarter-final.
summary.zh-CN: 除了英格兰在迈阿密面对挪威的高温外，还有雷暴的风险，特别是在世界杯四分之一决赛开始时。

title.en: Klopp agrees to replace Nagelsmann as Germany coach
title.zh-CN: 克洛普同意取代纳格尔斯曼担任德国教练

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp agrees a deal in principle to become the new head coach of Germany's men's national team after the resignation of Julian Nagelsmann.
summary.zh-CN: 尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）原则上同意在朱利安·纳格尔斯曼（ Julian Nagelsmann ）辞职后成为德国男子国家队的新任主教练。

title.en: Is it time to give record-breaker Pickford the credit he deserves?
title.zh-CN: 是时候给破纪录的皮克福德应得的荣誉了吗？

summary.en: Is it time to finally give England keeper Jordan Pickford the credit he deserves as he enters the World Cup history books, asks chief football writer Phil McNulty.
summary.zh-CN: 首席足球作家菲尔·麦克纳尔蒂（ Phil McNulty ）问道，是时候最终给予英格兰门将乔丹·皮克福德（ Jordan Pickford ）应有的荣誉，因为他进入了世界杯历史书籍。

title.en: Should Argentina take Messi off penalties?
title.zh-CN: 阿根廷是否应该取消对梅西的处罚？

summary.en: Lionel Messi keeps rewriting World Cup history, but after his latest miss from the spot, should Argentina hand penalty duties to someone else?
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）一直在重写世界杯的历史，但在他最近一次失误之后，阿根廷是否应该将罚款责任交给其他人？

title.en: From Arsenal jeers to Swiss tears: Xhaka's redemption
title.zh-CN: 从阿森纳的嘲笑到瑞士的眼泪：查卡的救赎

summary.en: Granit Xhaka has battled back from being booed by his own fans at Arsenal to being one of the most influential players for club and country as he looks to help Switzerland make history at the World...
summary.zh-CN: Granit Xhaka从自己在阿森纳的球迷嘘声中反击，成为俱乐部和国家最具影响力的球员之一，因为他希望帮助瑞士在世界上创造历史......

title.en: Playing golf with Trump surreal - Kane
title.zh-CN: 与特朗普超现实主义者一起打高尔夫球-凯恩

summary.en: England captain Harry Kane says he once played golf with United States President Donald Trump, describing the experience as "surreal".
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队队长哈里·凯恩（ Harry Kane ）说，他曾与美国总统唐纳德·特朗普（ Donald Trump ）打过高尔夫球，称这种经历

title.en: When the World Cup finishes, the football continues on BBC Sport
title.zh-CN: 世界杯结束后，英国广播公司体育频道继续播放足球赛事

summary.en: When the World Cup ends we'll still have loads of great content every day as we build up to the new football season.
summary.zh-CN: 当世界杯结束时，随着我们为新的足球赛季做准备，我们每天仍然会有大量精彩的内容。

title.en: Wales defender Lockyer signs for Melbourne Victory
title.zh-CN: 威尔士后卫洛克耶为墨尔本胜利签约

summary.en: Wales defender Tom Lockyer agrees a deal to join Australian A-League side Melbourne Victory.
summary.zh-CN: 威尔士后卫汤姆·洛克耶（ Tom Lockyer ）同意加入澳大利亚A联赛球队墨尔本胜利（ Melbourne Victory ）。

title.en: More than the Score

summary.en: Erling Haaland's Norway face England in their first ever World Cup quarter-final
summary.zh-CN: Erling Haaland的挪威队首次在世界杯四分之一决赛中面对英格兰队

title.en: No FIFA explanation over Quansah suspension, claims Tuchel
title.zh-CN: Tuchel声称，没有国际足联对Quansah停赛的解释

summary.en: Thomas Tuchel has claimed that England have not been offered an explanation as to why defender Jarell Quansah was handed a two-game suspension following his red card against Mexico.
summary.zh-CN: 托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）声称，英格兰队没有得到解释，为什么后卫贾雷尔·昆萨（ Jarell Quansah ）在对阵墨西哥队的红牌后被判两场禁赛。

title.en: Klopp agrees deal in principle to manage Germany
title.zh-CN: 克洛普原则上同意管理德国的交易

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp is on the verge of becoming Germany's new head coach after reaching an agreement in principle with the German Football Association [DFB], according to reports in Germany.
summary.zh-CN: 根据德国的报道，尤尔根·克洛普（ Jurgen Klopp ）在与德国足球协会（ DFB ）达成原则协议后，即将成为德国的新主教练。

title.en: ‘A brilliant reprieve, a unifying force’: America falls in love with World Cup
title.zh-CN: “辉煌的缓刑，团结的力量” ：美国爱上了世界杯

summary.en: Mikel Merino emerges as Spain's hero yet again as the substitute scores in the 88th minute to stun Belgium and set up a World Cup semi-final against France.

title.en: England favourites to reach semis, says Norway boss

summary.en: England are favourites to reach the semi-finals of the World Cup, Norway boss Stale Solbakken has told BBC Sport.

title.en: Jesus reunites with Ronaldo as new Portugal head coach

summary.en: Jorge Jesus is named Portugal's new head coach on a four-year contract to run through to the 2030 World Cup.

title.en: England's Guehi, Rice & James all train before Norway game

summary.en: Midfielder Declan Rice and defenders Marc Guehi and Reece James all train with England on the eve of Saturday's World Cup quarter-final against Norway.

title.en: Edwards leaves football chief role with Liverpool owners FSG

summary.en: Liverpool owners Fenway Sports Group announce the departure of Michael Edwards, the company's chief executive of football.

title.en: Mexico boss' explicit heckle a bit of fun - Gordon

summary.en: England winger Anthony Gordon says being sworn at by Mexico boss Javier Aguirre in a viral moment of their World Cup match was "just a bit of fun".

title.en: New species named after Cape Verde keeper Vozinha

summary.en: A new species of sea slug has been named after Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha to mark his performance against Spain at the World Cup.

title.en: England defender Charles joins Man City from Chelsea

summary.en: Manchester City have signed England international Niamh Charles for £500,000 from Women's Super League rivals Chelsea.

title.en: 'A bit of a rebel' - what can Celtic expect from forward Duran?

summary.en: Celtic are set to sign their first player in the transfer window - 24-year-old Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag - for a reported £5.5m. But who is he?

summary.en: West Ham have signed England forward Ebony Salmon on a two-year deal following her exit from Aston Villa.
